CreateUser.description: POST endpoint to register a new user account

methods.create_user: Route handler — validates body and delegates to UserService
methods.validate_unique_email: Checks DB for duplicate email before insert
methods.send_welcome_email: Fires async task to send onboarding email

AuthenticateUser.description: POST /token endpoint — returns JWT on valid credentials

methods.login: Route handler — calls UserService.verify then issues token
methods.verify_password: Runs bcrypt verify against stored hash
methods.create_access_token: Encodes user ID and role into signed JWT

ListProducts.description: GET endpoint returning paginated product catalogue

methods.get_products: Route handler — accepts page/limit query params
methods.apply_filters: Chains SQLAlchemy filters for category, price range
methods.paginate: Slices query result and returns total count alongside items

CreateOrder.description: POST endpoint to place a new customer order

methods.place_order: Route handler — validates stock then delegates to OrderService
methods.reserve_stock: Decrements product quantity atomically inside a transaction
methods.charge_customer: Calls PaymentService.charge and rolls back if it fails
